title: dysoxylum arborescens var. timorense
intro: Dysoxylum arborescens var. timorense, also known as the Timorese Dysoxylum, is a plant species belonging to the family Meliaceae. It is traditionally used in the treatment of various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds, as well as aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Dysoxylum arborescens var. timorense is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal use, although further research is required to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
